name: oceandrift-frontend
description: CesiumJS 3D globe for the oceandrift current field and drift tracks.
comment_overrides: cesium@1.136 caret-resolves @cesium/widgets to 14.5 (needs engine ^24) while core wants engine ^22 -> two @cesium/engine copies -> Cesium reads maximumTextureSize=0. Pin widgets+engine to a single 22.x.
